burning sensation during urination.description: A bacterial infection causing painful and frequent urination.
Inflammation of the bladder leading to discomfort and urgency.
Fungal infection with irritation, not usually painful urination.

headache and nausea.description: Severe headache often with nausea or light sensitivity.
Mild to moderate headache caused by stress or posture.
Digestive upset from contaminated food, can include headache.

fever and cough.description: Viral infection causing runny nose, cough, and mild fever.
A viral illness with high fever, body aches, and dry cough.
Viral infection with cough, fever, loss of taste/smell.

chest pain.description: Chest pain due to reduced blood flow to the heart.
Serious heart condition with crushing chest pain and shortness of breath.
Burning sensation due to stomach acid in the esophagus.

abdominal pain and diarrhea.description: Intestinal infection causing diarrhea, cramps, and vomiting.
Caused by contaminated food; includes nausea, cramps, diarrhea.
Functional bowel disorder causing discomfort and irregular stool.

itchy skin and rashes.description: Skin inflammation due to contact with allergens.
Chronic skin condition causing itchy, dry patches.
Parasitic skin infection causing severe itching, often at night.

sore throat.description: Inflammation of the throat often from viral infection.
Bacterial infection with sore throat, fever, and white patches.
Inflamed tonsils from viral or bacterial causes.

joint pain and stiffness.description: Degenerative joint disease causing stiffness and pain.
Autoimmune disease with systemic symptoms including joint pain.
